global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a vibrant green background and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting travel booking services with a focus on convenience.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background that fills the entire canvas, providing a fresh and inviting feel.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold, large text that reads 'Book your next trip' in a prominent font, centered in the lower part of the ad.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that says 'Hotels + flights in one tap', providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Shop now' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad, encouraging user interaction.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotels + flights in one tap

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' displayed at the top left corner, featuring a simple and modern design.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, eye-catching badge that says 'SALE' in a bright color, positioned at the top right corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, promoting travel booking services.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered at the bottom, the body text is below it, the logo is at the top left, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip, Hotels + flights in one tap, Shop now, CloudRoute, SALE
